# fleetdm_configuration_profiles (Data Source)

Fetches a list of MDM configuration profiles from FleetDM.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `team_id` (Number) Filter profiles by team ID. Use 0 or omit for global profiles.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.
- `profiles` (Attributes List) List of configuration profiles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--profiles))

<a id="nestedatt--profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `profiles`

Read-Only:

- `checksum` (String) The checksum of the profile content.
- `created_at` (String) When the profile was created.
- `identifier` (String) The profile identifier (macOS only).
- `labels_exclude_any` (Attributes List) Labels that will exclude the profile if any match. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--profiles--labels_exclude_any))
- `labels_include_all` (Attributes List) Labels that must all match for the profile to apply. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--profiles--labels_include_all))
- `labels_include_any` (Attributes List) Labels where any match will cause the profile to apply. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--profiles--labels_include_any))
- `name` (String) The name of the profile.
- `platform` (String) The platform (darwin, windows, ios, ipados).
- `profile_uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the profile.
- `team_id` (Number) The ID of the team the profile belongs to.
- `uploaded_at` (String) When the profile was last uploaded.

<a id="nestedatt--profiles--labels_exclude_any"></a>
### Nested Schema for `profiles.labels_exclude_any`

Read-Only:

- `broken` (Boolean) Whether the label is broken (no longer exists).
- `id` (Number) The ID of the label.
- `name` (String) The name of the label.


<a id="nestedatt--profiles--labels_include_all"></a>
### Nested Schema for `profiles.labels_include_all`

Read-Only:

- `broken` (Boolean) Whether the label is broken (no longer exists).
- `id` (Number) The ID of the label.
- `name` (String) The name of the label.


<a id="nestedatt--profiles--labels_include_any"></a>
### Nested Schema for `profiles.labels_include_any`

Read-Only:

- `broken` (Boolean) Whether the label is broken (no longer exists).
- `id` (Number) The ID of the label.
- `name` (String) The name of the label.
